summary: Contract Templates feature testing - Backend APIs pass (100%), Frontend has one bug: template selection not appearing in New Contract modal

ui_bugs.issue: Template selection ('Start from Template' / 'From Scratch') not appearing in the modal. The API call to /api/contract-templates is NOT being made when contracts page loads. Promise.all only fetches /doula/contracts and /doula/clients, skipping /contract-templates.
ui_bugs.evidence: Network trace shows only 2 of 3 API calls in loadData() are executed. Contract-templates API never called.

action_items: FIX: Debug why API_ENDPOINTS.CONTRACT_TEMPLATES call in contracts.tsx loadData() is not executing. Possible issues: 1) API endpoint path mismatch, 2) Promise rejection causing early exit, 3) React component not reaching the useEffect properly
VERIFY: Check if the template API call fails silently - add console.log in catch block
VERIFY: Ensure API_ENDPOINTS import is correct (default vs named export)
critical_code_review_comments: Bug in contracts.tsx line 138: The Promise.all should call 3 APIs but only 2 are being made. Need to investigate why apiRequest(API_ENDPOINTS.CONTRACT_TEMPLATES) is not executing.
The template selection UI code (lines 716-764) is correct and will work once templates state is populated.

success_rate.frontend: 75% (Templates page works, Templates button works, but template selection in contract creation fails)

seed_data_creation: Created test midwife user (testmidwife_ui@test.com) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for contract templates are fully working. Frontend contract-templates.tsx pages work correctly for both Doula and Midwife (CRUD operations). The bug is in contracts.tsx - the loadData() function's Promise.all call to CONTRACT_TEMPLATES endpoint is not executing. Network trace confirms only 2 of 3 API calls are made.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The API call to /api/contract-templates in contracts.tsx loadData() function is not being executed. This could be due to: 1) Early rejection of Promise.all if one promise fails before the third executes, 2) The endpoint path not being resolved correctly, or 3) Some React lifecycle issue preventing the full execution.
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe that 'Start from Template' section is missing above 'Select Client'
5. Check Network tab - only /doula/contracts and /doula/clients APIs called, /contract-templates is NOT called
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Need to add error logging to identify why the third API call is not executing. Could also try separating the contract-templates API call into its own try-catch to prevent it from being affected by other API failures.
